---
about:
  template: trestles
  id: about-block
  image: "img/Sfrw6tr9_400x400.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/belendfn
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/belenhipola/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:maria.hipola@phd.unibocconi.it"
---

# About me

::: {.tagline}
PhD Candidate in Economics, Bocconi University
:::

I am a third-year PhD student in Economics at Bocconi University. I am interested in applied microeconomics, particularly education and labor economics.

Prior to joining Bocconi, I received an MA in Economics from Columbia University, a BA in Economics and a BSc in Mathematics and Statistics from Universidad Complutense de Madrid.
